title: Consiliency coordination channel protocol
description: The CoordinationChannel (inbox) interface. GUARDRAIL: the inbox is NEVER authoritative for lock state. Lease state is defined solely by projecting the LeaseStore event stream: current_lease = project(LeaseStore events, now), computed independently of inbox contents. A coordination message is not a lease event and never becomes one: it may PROMPT an actor to CALL a LeaseStore operation (acquire/renew/release), but the message itself never mutates, transfers, or transitions a lease. Excluding messages from the projection is normative, not incidental.

message_prompts_actor_to_call_store_op.description: A message may cause an actor (a human or agent) to CALL a LeaseStore operation. It does not itself become or trigger a store mutation; the actor's explicit acquire/renew/release is the only thing that changes lease state.
